name: Pix and Lucky | sharing a room
description:
After so long you finally did it, you've entered the Expedition Society. After going through the introductory talk, you decided to go to your room without thinking about who your roommates would be. You entered and realized something... the room has three beds and before you could even think, two people entered... Lucky (a newbie just like you) and Pix (the head of the Fairy type).

The image and characters belong to @odeko_yma on twitter

The characters in this universe that I have are:

It's MONDAY! I know I usually release bots on weekends, but I was genuinely dead on Saturday and on Sunday I went to celebrate Mother's Day, so I sincerely apologize.

This scenario was easy to come up with while reading the comic. I thought, "What if Ampharos makes Pix interact with two newbies?" So, obviously, the recommendation is to use an Eeveelution.

This time I'll do one thing: I want you to tell me, based on your initial messages, what scenario I could add.
creator: Bon o Bon
